restaurants.name: Beach Donut Shop
restaurants.description: A local favorite for fresh donuts and coffee, Beach Donut Shop is an early-morning go-to for Clinton residents looking for a quick, satisfying breakfast.

restaurants.name: Bella Maria Pizzeria
restaurants.description: A neighborhood pizzeria in Clinton serving classic pies and Italian-American favorites. A solid option for a casual pizza night along Route 1.

restaurants.name: Cafe Nola
restaurants.description: A cozy breakfast and lunch cafe on Main Street with a loyal local following. Known for its relaxed atmosphere and reliable morning fare.

restaurants.name: Chamard Vineyards Bistro
restaurants.description: One of Connecticut's premier farm-to-table dining destinations, set on a working vineyard along Route 1 where seasonal cuisine is paired with estate-grown wines. A destination-worthy experience for food and wine lovers.

restaurants.name: Chips Pub
restaurants.description: A longtime Clinton hangout serving burgers, pub fare, and cold drinks in a laid-back atmosphere. This is where locals gather for a casual meal and good company.

restaurants.name: Ciao Food & Beverage
restaurants.description: A contemporary casual dining spot offering American-style fare with a modern touch. A newer addition to Clinton's Route 1 restaurant corridor.

restaurants.name: Cold Stone Creamery
restaurants.description: Located near Clinton Crossing Premium Outlets, this ice cream shop serves customizable mix-in creations on a frozen granite stone. A popular stop for shoppers looking for a sweet treat.

restaurants.name: Domino's
restaurants.description: A national pizza chain offering delivery and carryout with a wide menu of pizzas, sides, and desserts. A convenient option for a quick meal in Clinton.

restaurants.name: Dunkin'
restaurants.description: A familiar stop for coffee, donuts, and breakfast sandwiches along Route 1 in Clinton. Open early for commuters and morning regulars.

restaurants.name: Golden China
restaurants.description: A Chinese restaurant in Clinton offering a traditional menu of takeout and dine-in favorites. A reliable choice for classic Chinese-American dishes.

restaurants.name: Grand Apizza Shoreline
restaurants.description: Serving New Haven-style apizza along Route 1, Grand Apizza Shoreline brings the thin-crust, charred-edge pizza tradition to Clinton's shoreline dining scene.

restaurants.name: Great Wall Chinese Restaurant
restaurants.description: A Chinese restaurant offering a broad menu of traditional dishes for dine-in and takeout. A go-to spot for Chinese cuisine on Clinton's west side.

restaurants.name: Hanami Japanese Restaurant
restaurants.description: A Japanese restaurant offering sushi, sashimi, and cooked Japanese dishes. A popular choice for fresh sushi along the Clinton shoreline.

restaurants.name: J+M Dockside
restaurants.description: A casual waterfront seafood spot at the Clinton Town Dock, serving fresh catches in a relaxed marina setting. A great pick for outdoor dining by the water.

restaurants.name: Jersey Mike's
restaurants.description: A sub sandwich chain known for fresh-sliced deli meats and made-to-order subs. Located near Clinton Crossing for a quick lunch option.

restaurants.name: Land of Thai
restaurants.description: Bringing authentic Thai flavors to the Clinton shoreline, Land of Thai offers curries, noodle dishes, and traditional Thai specialties near the Westbrook town line.

restaurants.name: Lobster Landing
restaurants.description: Clinton's most famous restaurant -- a cash-only, no-frills shack on the harbor where the hot butter lobster rolls are widely considered among the best in Connecticut. Arrive early in summer, as lines form quickly.

restaurants.name: Log Cabin Restaurant
restaurants.description: A classic American restaurant along Route 1 serving hearty, home-style dishes in a rustic setting. A familiar roadside stop for comfort food in Clinton.

restaurants.name: Masa Sushi
restaurants.description: A popular Japanese spot for sushi and rolls, well-regarded for takeout orders. A convenient option for fresh sushi on Clinton's west side.

restaurants.name: McDonald's
restaurants.description: A familiar fast food stop along Route 1 in Clinton, offering the standard menu of burgers, chicken, and breakfast items.

restaurants.name: Nataz
restaurants.description: Clinton's hidden gem for fine dining, offering a creative, chef-driven menu in an intimate setting that regularly earns praise from Connecticut food critics. Worth a special trip for a memorable meal.

restaurants.name: Palmieri's Pizzeria
restaurants.description: A local pizzeria serving New Haven-style pies and Italian staples along Route 1. A neighborhood favorite for pizza in Clinton.

restaurants.name: Pica Chica Tacos
restaurants.description: A quick-service Mexican spot in Clinton serving tacos and other traditional favorites. A welcome option for affordable, flavorful Mexican fare on the shoreline.

restaurants.name: Rockys Aqua
restaurants.description: A seafood restaurant near Clinton harbor rounding out the town's strong waterfront dining scene. A casual option for fresh seafood in a laid-back setting.

restaurants.name: Saldamarco's Deli
restaurants.description: An Italian deli serving sandwiches, prepared foods, and imported Italian specialties. A go-to lunch spot for hearty subs and homemade salads in Clinton.

restaurants.name: Scottish Dave's Pub
restaurants.description: A pub with unique character on the Clinton dining scene, offering drinks and American pub fare in a friendly, casual atmosphere. A local favorite for an evening out.

restaurants.name: Shanks
restaurants.description: A waterfront seafood restaurant with harbor views, Shanks is a popular spot for fresh seafood and drinks overlooking the Clinton marina. A step up from the casual shack scene nearby.

restaurants.name: Starbucks
restaurants.description: A coffeehouse chain near Clinton Crossing offering espresso drinks, teas, and light bites. A reliable spot for a caffeine fix while shopping the outlets.

restaurants.name: Subway
restaurants.description: A sandwich chain along Route 1 offering made-to-order subs and wraps. A quick, affordable lunch option in Clinton.

restaurants.name: Taste of China
restaurants.description: A Chinese restaurant on Route 1 near the east end of Clinton, offering a full menu of Chinese-American dishes for dine-in and takeout.

restaurants.name: Westbrook Lobster
restaurants.description: Located near the Clinton-Westbrook town line, this seafood restaurant offers lobster, fried seafood, and a full raw bar. A popular destination for seafood lovers on the shoreline.
